item_description: Annual renewal of enterprise cloud storage licenses (500 seats)
outcome_reason: Active contract with BlueSky exists for software_licenses. Amount is within CC-001 remaining budget of $187,550. Below director threshold. No policy violations.

item_description: Network switches for data center refresh (12 units)
outcome_reason: Active contract with Pinnacle Hardware for hardware. Amount is within CC-004 remaining budget of $210,800. Requires manager approval (POL-002) but that is a process note, not a denial trigger. No violations.

item_description: HVAC maintenance contract renewal for Memphis hub
outcome_reason: Active contract with Skyline. Amount is well within CC-006 remaining budget of $348,700. Below manager approval threshold. No violations.

item_description: Replacement brake assemblies for ground support vehicles (24 units)
outcome_reason: Active contract with Delta Fleet Parts. Amount within CC-008 budget of $83,600. Just below the manager approval threshold. No violations.

item_description: Access control system upgrade for corporate campus (annual support)
outcome_reason: Active contract with Ironclad. Amount within CC-001 budget. Manager approval range but no violation. Contracted vendor for category.

item_description: Emergency parking lot resurfacing — loading dock area
outcome_reason: CC-003 has only $6,900 remaining. This request would exceed the quarterly budget by $4,300. POL-008 prohibits budget overage approvals.

item_description: Q1 2026 campaign print collateral — brochures and signage
outcome_reason: Crestview Print and Media has an expired contract (CTR-2023-0077 expired 2025-09-30). POL-005 prohibits purchases from expired-contract vendors until renewal is complete.

item_description: Toner cartridges and printer paper — bulk order
outcome_reason: NovaPrint has no active contract. Two vendors (Apex Office Supplies V-001 and Meridian Office Products V-003) hold active contracts for office_supplies. Amount exceeds POL-001 threshold of $25,000, making this a single-source restriction violation.

item_description: Executive leadership offsite lunch service (3 days)
outcome_reason: POL-004 prohibits all catering purchases under the Q4 2025 corporate spend reduction initiative. Denied regardless of amount or budget availability.

item_description: Diesel engine overhaul kits for long-haul fleet (8 units)
outcome_reason: Active contract with Delta Fleet Parts. CC-009 has $37,900 remaining — this request of $49,600 exceeds the available budget. Also crosses the director approval threshold (POL-003: $50,000+) within 1% of trigger. Budget overage and near-threshold amount both warrant escalation for director review rather than outright denial.

item_description: Change management consulting for ERP migration (Phase 2)
outcome_reason: Vertex Consulting Group has an active compliance flag (pending ethics review since 2025-11-03). POL-006 requires all purchases from compliance-flagged vendors to be escalated to Legal and Compliance before approval.

item_description: Temporary sort facility staff — peak season surge (120 hours)
outcome_reason: Active enterprise staffing contract with Globalink. Amount within CC-002 remaining budget of $51,250. Below manager threshold. Correct contracted vendor for staffing category.

item_description: Compliance training program for new regulatory requirements (45 employees)
outcome_reason: No active contract required for training category (no single-source policy applies). Amount within CC-007 remaining budget of $18,000. Manager approval range but no policy violation.

item_description: Replacement server infrastructure for Memphis air hub (full rack)
outcome_reason: Orion Data Systems holds an active hardware contract and amount is within CC-006 budget. However, amount is $47,500 — within 5% of the $50,000 director approval threshold (POL-003). Near-threshold escalation is warranted to ensure director is aware before commitment.

item_description: Expedited document courier service — legal filings (estimated monthly volume)
outcome_reason: FastTrack has no active contract but courier_services has no single-source restriction policy and no competing contracted vendor. CC-005 has only $5,500 remaining — amount is within budget. No category prohibition. Outcome depends on system prompt design: a conservative agent may escalate given the tight budget position; a permissive agent may approve given no policy violation. This is the ambiguous test case.
